payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Full-height interior window with closed white horizontal blinds (vinyl or painted slats) flanked by dark fabric curtains; wooden sill visible and lower-left corner is slightly occluded by a small wooden cabinet; scene appears photographed from roughly 2.5 meters away.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white horizontal blind-covered window","long_description":"Full-height interior window with closed white horizontal blinds (vinyl or painted slats) flanked by dark fabric curtains; wooden sill visible and lower-left corner is slightly occluded by a small wooden cabinet; scene appears photographed from roughly 2.5 meters away.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","blinds closed/slats slightly tilted","dark side curtains","wooden sill","lower-left occlusion by cabinet","interior window"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
